one_time_description: Gain on disposal of property/capital assets
economic_notes: Membertou Properties Limited Partnership is a government business enterprise accounted for on modified equity basis. Band owns 35.71% of First Nations Fisheries Interest Group. Multiple commercial enterprises including Trade & Convention Centre, Gaming Commission, Insurance Brokers, Commercial Fisheries, Entertainment Centre, Business Centre, Cultural and Heritage Centre Foundation, Data Centre, Geomatics, Sport and Wellness Centre, Lanes @ Membertou, Lobster operations.
notes: Complex consolidation including 20+ subsidiaries and one GBE (Membertou Properties Limited Partnership on modified equity basis). Net financial liabilities of $183.6M driven largely by $206M long-term debt. Purchased fishing licenses and permits of $121.8M are indefinite-lived intangible assets not amortized. Hedge accounting applied: prime plus 1.5% mortgage hedged with 3.495% fixed interest rate swap. Band adopted new PSAS standards PS 3450, PS 3041, PS 2601, PS 1201, and PS 3280 effective April 1, 2022. ISC funding not separately disclosed within government transfers total of $22.1M. Deferred trust contributions of $6.7M. Capital lease obligations of $1.09M.
